name: detectAnomalies
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || (Array.isArray(output.result.anomalies) && output.result.anomalies.every(function(a){ return Number.isFinite(a.value) && Number.isFinite(a.zScore) && typeof a.date === 'string'; }))
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'analytics.detectAnomalies'. Component sends {artifact:{data:{dataPoints:[{date,value}]}}}. Returns {mean,stdDev,totalPoints,anomaliesFound,anomalies:[{date,value,zScore,isAnomaly,direction}],threshold}. POISON (the real bug fixed): parseFloat('1e999')/parseFloat('Infinity')=Infinity (truthy → bare ||0 misses it) → mean/stdDev=Infinity → JSON null → blank render. finNum collapses non-finite to 0 so every value stays FINITE; safeRound never emits Infinity/NaN. Pinned by server/tests/analytics-lens-macros.test.js.
